Table of Contents

Interface IXMLWriter

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the sequential writing of XML.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("5F50E520-1278-4C7A-937C-AE5874548431")]
public interface IXMLWriter

Obtains the declared namespace prefix for a namespace.

uri string
